_comment: Claude Code settings for bethel-dashboard. PostToolUse hooks run after every Edit/Write so Claude sees lint and smoke-test results without being asked. PreToolUse hooks block destructive operations.

PostToolUse._comment: Format check after every edit. Failure means the file isn't pretty-formatted; Claude must fix.
Run the smoke test subset after every edit. Tagged @smoke in the test files. Keep this fast (<30s).

PreToolUse._comment: Block destructive bash commands. Anything matching this regex requires the user to type explicit confirmation in chat first.
PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E '(rm -rf|git push --force|git reset --hard|DROP TABLE|DROP DATABASE|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM [a-z_]+ *;|ALTER TABLE.*DROP|supabase db reset)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: destructive operation detected. Confirm in chat before proceeding.'; exit 1; fi

PreToolUse._comment: Block edits to migrations that have already been applied to production. Migrations are append-only.
PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E 'migrations/[0-9]+_.*\.sql' && [ -f .applied_migrations ] && grep -q "$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oE 'migrations/[0-9]+_[^"]*\.sql')" .applied_migrations; then echo 'BLOCKED: this migration has been applied to production. Write a new migration instead.'; exit 1; fi

PreToolUse._comment: Block accidental commits of secrets. Service role keys and SMTP creds must never reach git.
PreToolUse.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -E 'git (add|commit).*\.env'; then echo 'BLOCKED: refusing to add .env to git. Use .env.example for templates.'; exit 1; fi
